ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the company's website */,
  "year_founded" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Annual revenue of the company */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the contact */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the contact */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact */,
  "title" TEXT /* Professional title */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the contact */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred method of contact */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "seniority_level" TEXT /* Seniority level of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location or office of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_contacts" (
  "company_contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company-contact association */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contact */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the contact holds */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the contact belongs to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the contact started in the role */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the contact ended in the role (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_contacts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_contacts_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_contacts_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_contacts_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contact */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., meeting, email, phone call) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_time" TEXT /* Time of the interaction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Detailed notes about the interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, employee) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Numerical access level (e.g., 1 for admin, 2 for manager, 3 for employee) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
